heading: Report by Attorney General
label: 10712 Report by Attorney General
text: Not later than , the Attorney General, in consultation with the Federal Judicial Center, shall transmit to the Committees on the Judiciary of the Senate and the House of Representatives a report on the effectiveness of the Institute in carrying out the duties specified in . Such report shall include an assessment of the cost effectiveness of the program as a whole and, to the extent practicable, of individual grants, an assessment of whether the restrictions and limitations specified in sections 10706 and 10707 of this title have been respected, and such recommendations as the Attorney General, in consultation with the Federal Judicial Center, deems appropriate.October 1, 2002section 10702(b) of this title
notes: Amendments2002— substituted “Not later than ” for “On ”.Pub. L. 107–179October 1, 2002October 1, 1987
